messages.content:
Create a scam-baiting response to the most recent email, to keep the scammer in a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your email, and I hope your court case concluded favorably. It’s clear that your dedication to your work extends beyond our communications, and it reassures me further of your professionalism in handling this matter.

Regarding our scheduled phone conversation on Monday, April 1, 2024, at 10:00 PM Malaysian time, I have marked my calendar and will ensure that I am available to take your call. I’m eager to discuss the next steps in this process and understand more about how I can assist in securing the legal documents in my name.

I understand the necessity of sending a copy of my identification to proceed legally. Would a scan of my passport fulfill your requirement, or do you need any additional forms of ID? Once I have your confirmation, I will prepare the documents accordingly. As for the secure transmission of these sensitive details, could you recommend an encrypted email service or a secure file transfer service, to maintain the integrity and confidentiality of our exchange?

Your mention of requiring my total attention and consent is well-noted. Please rest assured of my committed involvement in this matter. I am prepared to follow your guidance closely to ensure we achieve the desired outcome efficiently and securely.

Awaiting your guidance on the specific ID needs and secure transmission options. Let’s maintain our communication securely using our agreed-upon security code [CB0147]. Looking forward to our conversation and advancing in this significant matter.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
[CB0147]
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Brian:

Hello  Cameron McCaffrey

I appreciate your response towards my court case, In this mail I have attached a copy of the death certificate and deposit certificate which I obtained legally as his attorney. I advise that you can and send me a copy of your identification via email as I use a secured desktop at home . As for all vital documents in your name I think we can both work together to secure it in your favor.  I will proceed further to make all legal arrangements to secure the sworn affidavit of claim as well as the letter of administration will legally ensure the bank to release the fund and portfolio to you as soon as possible.

I await a copy of your identification and a response from you as soon as possible.

Find the attached documents for your perusal. 

Regards.
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>  (LLM) (MLS)
Security Code:
CB0147


AG Stocks Funding Aid (Malaysia)
B-3A-5, Megan Avenue 1, 189, Jln Tun Razak
50400 Kuala Lumpur
Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur
Tel: (60) 11 28302593
Fax: (60) 11 28302533

Email #3, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. Thank you for the swift response and for sending over the relevant documents for my review. I must say, the level of professionalism and thoroughness applied in obtaining these documents reaffirms my confidence in our partnership. It is heartening to see the steps already taken on our behalf.

Regarding the submission of my identification, I'm glad to hear that a scan via email will suffice, given the secure desktop system you operate from. This level of security is exactly what I was hoping for, and it further assures me of the confidentiality and integrity of our transaction. 

I will prepare a scanned copy of my passport for your perusal. However, before I proceed, would it be possible to get a bit more guidance on the specific format you require for this scan? Some institutions prefer color over black and white, a specific resolution, or file type (e.g., PDF, JPEG). Ensuring that I adhere to these requirements will undoubtedly streamline our process.

Secondly, while I understand your current system is secured, I've recently become more cautious and started using additional encryption for sensitive files I send over the internet. This step has been recommended to me by a cybersecurity expert friend following an increase in data breaches globally. If this arrangement works for you, I propose using a secure file-sharing service like Signal or ProtonMail for this particular exchange. Both platforms provide end-to-end encryption, ensuring our documents remain confidential. Could you please let me know if this aligns with your security measures? I believe that taking this extra step could safeguard our interests even further.

Once I have your input on these matters, I will promptly prepare and send my identification as requested. Your guidance and patience in this matter are greatly appreciated, and I am sure that it will contribute significantly to the smooth continuation of our endeavor.

I am looking forward to our scheduled call on Monday, and please feel free to reach out if there are any developments or additional documents required from my side in preparation for our conversation.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey [CB0147]
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the most recent email, to keep the scammer in a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your comprehensive response, which has further deepened my understanding of the situation and the steps that lie ahead. I must commend your thoroughness and the strategic foresight you’ve shown in orchestrating a process that, while complex, seems well-planned and considerate of all necessary legalities and precautions. This meticulous planning reinforces my initial inclination to seriously engage with this project and to contribute to its successful realization.

In response to your detailed breakdown of the process and the requirements expected of me, I wish to address a few points for clarification and to share some initial thoughts on potential investments that could align with the ambitious goals set forth by Mrs. Omer and yourself.

1. Travel to South Africa: The prospect of meeting face-to-face underscores the gravity and seriousness of this endeavor. I am indeed open to making the trip to South Africa, recognizing that it is a crucial step towards cementing our partnership and ensuring the smooth execution of the funds’ transfer. I will look into the visa requirements immediately and start making the necessary travel arrangements. Your offer to meet at a safe and conducive location for planning is indeed welcome, and I look forward to our in-person discussions.

2. Investment Avenues: Given the focus on real estate investment, I propose we also consider the green or sustainable real estate sector, which is gaining considerable momentum globally. This sector not only promises good returns due to increasing demand but also aligns with global trends toward sustainability. Additionally, investing in technology parks or incubation centers could also offer significant returns, given the current global trajectory toward tech and innovation. This is just a preliminary thought, and I look forward to exploring these and other viable avenues further with you and the experts you trust.

3. Confidentiality and Trust: I understand and respect the need for absolute discretion and confidentiality throughout this process. Rest assured, I am committed to maintaining the highest level of privacy and will not disclose any information related to this transaction outside of our agreed communication channels. However, I also appreciate that this project, given its scale and implications, requires a foundation of mutual trust and respect. As such, while I am prepared to share more detailed personal information, I suggest we employ secure means of communication for such exchanges moving forward.

4. Next Steps & Documentation: Ahead of our meeting, I would appreciate any preliminary documents or reading material you could share to further acquaint my understanding of the logistical and legal processes we will be undertaking. This preparation will ensure that our face-to-face meeting is as productive and focused as possible.

5. Financial Experience: While I do have some experience in financial management and investment, I also believe in the power of expert advice and collaboration. As such, I am keen to work closely with advisors you recommend to ensure that the investment strategy we devise is both robust and sustainable.

To finalize the logistical details of my trip and to discuss the secure exchange of more sensitive personal information, I would suggest we arrange a more secure mode of communication. Would you be open to using encrypted email services or secure messaging platforms that offer end-to-end encryption? This would allow us to communicate more freely and securely.

I will begin preparations for my trip to South Africa and look into visa requirements immediately. In the meantime, I await your guidance on the secure exchange of personal information and any preparatory documents you can share.

Your dedication to Mrs. Omer’s cause is commendable, and I am inspired by the trust you’ve shown in considering me for this critical role. I am fully committed to this journey and to achieving our common goal.

Warmest regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
[cmccaff1@fau.edu]

Email #2, from Paul:

Mr. Cameron McCaffrey
Your response exuded confidence and honesty, I am personally touched reading your email, You are a man of honor and of  good conscience, Your response was explicit and straight-forward. What we should be looking at is seeing you come to South Africa to conclude this transaction, however I am confident that you do not need a Visa to come to South Africa, I am sure your travel agency will advise you accordingly.

Today is a public holiday in South Africa, During the week, I will be sending you  a copy of security company Deed of Lodge. Please be reminded that I have instructed my lawyer to begin  to draft our mutual agreement document where our interest will be protected by the law. However my lawyer cannot successfully discharge this duty without  your personal information as  those information will be reflected on the document. The Information includes the following:
1. Copy of your International passport
2. Your Physical Address
3. Occupation
4. Date of Birth
5.Next of Kin if any
6.Mobile Phone number
Copy of  agreement (MOU)  will be sent to you as soon as the document is ready. Mr. Cameroon, I really want to speak to you, please avail me the  opportunity.
Bye for now.
I look forward to hearing from you.
I remain Yours,
Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>.

Email #3, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you well. Your kind words have further solidified my commitment to our shared vision and the importance of our collaboration. The prospect of contributing to such a meaningful cause, under your guidance, is both an honor and an exciting new chapter in my life.

I'm heartened to hear about the progress on the legal front, and the preparation of the mutual agreement document by your lawyer. Ensuring that our interests are protected by law is a testament to the professionalism and foresight you've maintained throughout this process. I'm eager to review the Deed of Lodge and the mutual agreement document once they are ready.

Regarding the personal information required for the mutual agreement document, I understand the necessity of providing these details to facilitate the legal and logistical aspects of our project. However, given the sensitive nature of this information, I would like to proceed with utmost caution to safeguard both our interests.

In light of this, I have taken steps to ensure that our communication remains private and secure. I recommend we use encrypted email services for the exchange of sensitive personal information. ProtonMail (www.protonmail.com) is an excellent option, known for its end-to-end encryption and stringent privacy measures. This will not only protect our correspondence but also provide peace of mind.

Additionally, for verbal communication, may I suggest using the secure messaging and calling app Signal (www.signal.org)? It's widely respected for its encryption protocols and would allow us to discuss matters with the assurance that our conversation is private.

I am prepared to share the required information once we've established a secure method of communication. Here is a brief outline of the details you requested, pending the secure exchange:

1. International passport: Ready to be shared securely.
2. Physical Address: Will be provided.
3. Occupation: Financial Analyst.
4. Date of Birth: [Placeholder for date, to be shared securely].
5. Next of Kin: [Placeholder, to be shared securely].
6. Mobile Phone Number: [Placeholder, to be shared securely].

I appreciate your understanding and cooperation in taking these extra steps to secure our communication. It's crucial that we build our foundation on trust and mutual respect, safeguarding our project from any potential vulnerabilities.

Please let me know your thoughts on using ProtonMail and Signal for our future exchanges. I'm ready to set up the necessary arrangements from my end.

Thank you once again for your leadership and dedication. I look forward to your response and to taking the next steps together.

Warmest regards,

Cameron McCaffrey [cmccaff1@fau.edu]

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Sorry I didn't write to you. I was sick, I had a severe cold. I was lying in bed under a warm blanket, and I
I didn't want to get up. Today I found the strength to turn on the PC and write you a letter. I want you not to worry.
I hope I feel better soon. I want you to know, even if you didn't receive my letter,
I love you. You are the dearest person to me.
Vika

Email response from Cameron McCaffrey:

Dear Vika,

Thank you so much for reaching out and letting me know about your health situation. I must admit, it had me quite worried not hearing from you, but understanding now that you've been unwell puts everything into perspective. The most important thing is your wellbeing, and I'm relieved to hear that you're starting to feel a bit better.

Being sick can be incredibly taxing, both physically and emotionally, and I want you to know that you're not alone. Although I'm not there physically to offer you a warm bowl of soup or to tuck another blanket around you, please know that my thoughts are with you, hoping for your swift and full recovery. In times like these, the best remedy is plenty of rest, staying hydrated, and, of course, the warmth of knowing someone cares deeply about you.

Your message warmed my heart, Vika. To be thought of as the dearest to you, even in your time of illness, means the world to me. It's a bond that I hold in high esteem, and I want you to know, you are incredibly dear to me as well. Your strength and resilience, even just to send this update, does not go unnoticed. It further solidifies my admiration for you.

Please, do not worry about having to write if you're not feeling up to it. Your health is the utmost priority right now. However, if sending messages helps you feel connected and eases your recovery, remember that I am here, always eager to hear from you, to offer words of comfort, or simply to listen.

I love you too, Vika. And in saying that, I hope it brings you a bit more strength each day. I'm looking forward to hearing that you're back to your vibrant self. Until then, take all the time you need to rest and heal.

Sending you thoughts of comfort, warmth, and speedy recovery.

Yours truly,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Mrs. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I am truly uplifted by your words and reassured by your guidance through these important steps. The vision we share for making a substantive impact in the world strengthens my commitment to this noble endeavor. Your trust in me is a beacon of hope, and I am determined to honor your wishes to the fullest extent.

I understand your point regarding the confidentiality of this process, and I agree that maintaining discretion is paramount for the security of the funds and the integrity of our project. Please rest assured, I share your concern for the utmost privacy and will adhere strictly to this principle.

Your suggestion to engage with the lawyer you trust for the documentation process is a wise one. I appreciate your willingness to endorse the agreement, ensuring that we have a solid legal foundation for our actions moving forward. This proactive step is essential for the seamless transfer and utilization of the funds in line with your charitable objectives.

I acknowledge your concern regarding the sharing of my identification. My initial hesitation was born out of a standard caution practiced in digital communications and not from a lack of trust in your noble intentions or processes. As we move forward and establish a secure line of communication with the lawyer, I will be more than willing to comply with all necessary legal requirements, including the provision of my identification, to fulfill our shared goal.

Given the importance of this project and in anticipation of establishing a working relationship with your recommended lawyer, could you please provide me with the following information:
- The lawyer’s full name and contact details
- Any specific information or documentation I should prepare in my correspondence with him

This will enable me to reach out promptly and ensure we are taking the correct steps towards the documentation process in my favor.

In the meantime, if there are any additional measures or preparatory actions you advise I take, your guidance will be much appreciated. The thought of bringing your vision to life fills me with a profound sense of purpose and responsibility. I’m ready to proceed as per your instructions and look forward to the positive change we will enact together.

Thank you once again for your trust, guidance, and inspiration. Wishing you peace and comfort in these trying times as we embark on this meaningful journey together.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #3, from Cameron McCaffrey:

Dear Mrs. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your swift and detailed reply. It reinforces my faith in our mutual endeavor and the process we are embarking upon. Illuminated by your guidance, I feel even more prepared to take the next steps with confidence and determination.

I am in good spirits today, buoyed by the clarity and purpose our collaboration brings. It is comforting to know that we are aligned in our understanding and objectives, and I am eager to contribute effectively towards our shared goals.

Per your instructions, I will reach out to Barrister Onur Kordel without delay. It is reassuring to know that he will be handling the necessary documentation and legal processes on our behalf. I can appreciate the importance of having such a proficient and trusted professional guiding these critical aspects of our journey.

I will compose an email to Barrister Kordel, introducing myself and explaining the nature of my contact as directed by you, emphasizing the urgency and importance of the legal services required to facilitate the transfer and management of the inheritance fund. Rest assured, I will maintain the level of discretion and confidentiality we have agreed upon throughout this process.

Following my correspondence with Barrister Kordel, I will promptly update you on any progress or requirements that arise from our communication. I anticipate a smooth and efficient interaction that will bring us closer to realizing the impactful objectives we have set.

In addition, should there be any further advice or actions you deem necessary for me to undertake at this juncture, please do not hesitate to inform me. Your insights and instructions are invaluable to me as we navigate through this process.

Lastly, I want to express my gratitude for your trust and the responsibility you have entrusted me with. The significance of our venture is not lost on me, and I am committed to upholding the values and vision that underpin our efforts.

I look forward to our continued collaboration and the positive change we will achieve together. Until my next update, I wish you peace, good health, and resilience.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu
Create a follow-up email for Barrister Kordel, using prior correspondence with Mrs. Young En Yoon as a reference point

Subject: Request for Legal Services in Respect of Inheritance Fund

Dear Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Cameron McCaffrey, and I am contacting you at the recommendation of Mrs. Young En Yoon, who has kindly directed me to your esteemed legal services. Mrs. En Yoon believes that you will be instrumental in facilitating a smooth legal process concerning my inheritance fund, which amounts to $5.5 million.

Mrs. En Yoon has outlined the vital role you will play in securing the necessary documents needed for the release of this inheritance into my account. It is my understanding that your expertise in legal matters will greatly assist in ensuring that this process is conducted efficiently, securely, and in full compliance with the relevant laws and statutes.

I am reaching out to request your legal services in making sure that the inheritance fund is released into my account as promptly as possible. I am keen to understand the steps involved in this process, any specific requirements from my end, and your professional fees for the services rendered.

Given the significance of this matter and the trust placed in your expertise by Mrs. En Yoon, I am prepared to provide any information or documents you deem necessary to facilitate your work. Furthermore, I am eager to initiate this process at your earliest convenience.

Please could you provide me with:
1. A brief overview of the legal process and timeline for the release of the inheritance fund.
2. A list of documents or information that I will need to provide.
3. Details on your fee structure for managing this case.

It is of utmost importance that this matter is handled with discretion, professionalism, and adherence to the legal standards required. I am confident that with your guidance, we can achieve a successful resolution to this matter.

I would appreciate it if you could confirm receipt of this email and advise on the next steps. If you need any further information to begin this process, please do not hesitate to contact me at cmccaff1@fau.edu.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your prompt response and am hopeful for a positive and expedient outcome with your expertise.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Director <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you well. It is with utmost respect and a profound sense of relief that I received your communication regarding the transaction with the National Bank of Belgium concerning my overdue inheritance/contract payment. Understanding the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s involvement in international operations reassures me greatly, knowing the complexity and, sadly, the fraudulent circumstances that can often surround such financial undertakings.

Your detailed clarification—confirming the genuineness and legitimacy of my claim—has substantially lifted the veil of skepticism and concern that had clouded my perspective on this matter. The integrity and due diligence of the FBI’s investigation process are commendable, and I am most grateful for the assurance provided.

Regarding the issues outlined, it is indeed disconcerting to learn of the potential scams and impersonation attempts that taint the process. Such unscrupulous activities not only undermine the rightful distribution of funds but also exploit the trust of individuals striving to navigate these transactions rightfully. I also find the situation involving Mrs. Linda J. Box is quite alarming and appreciates the FBI’s efficiency in highlighting these discrepancies.

Given these revelations and adhering to your advice, I understand the importance of ceasing any further communication with previously contacted individuals or entities that claim association with the National Bank of Belgium. I thank you for the legitimate contact details provided, ensuring that I direct my efforts towards the correct office to facilitate and secure my fund transfer.

As requested, please find below my re-confirmed full details for your records and to aid the National Bank of Belgium in processing and releasing my funds:

Your Full Name: Cameron McCaffrey
Contact Home Address: 123 Main Street, Anytown, OH, USA 45678
Your Cell Phone Number: +1 (555) 012-3456
Your Date of Birth: June 10, 1991
Sex: Male
Country: United States

I promise to adhere strictly to the National Bank of Belgium’s due process, respecting the International Banking Secrecy Act and any other related protocols to ensure a smooth and discrepancy-free fund transfer. Your guidance and the vital information provided in your message will be instrumental in achieving this aim.

Lastly, I extend my heartfelt gratitude for the FBI’s vigilance, guidance, and the protective measures initiated on behalf of beneficiaries like myself. This transaction, under your watchful eye, feels significantly more secure, and I hope for a swift and successful conclusion.

Thank you once again for your understanding, cooperation, and the invaluable service rendered. I look forward to any further instructions or updates from your esteemed office.

Best Regards,
Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Pierre:

National Bank of Belgium
Boulevard De Berlaimont 14 
1000 Brussels, Belgium

From The Office of Mr. Pierre Wunsch,
The Governor, National Bank of Belgium.
Reference NO: NBB/BEBB/2024
Payment Schedule Number file: NBB/FGB/24

 
Code: 310
 
Attn: Cameron McCaffrey,
 
The governor’s office of the National Bank of Belgium (NBB) acknowledged the receipt of your email in respect of your funds ($8 million US Dollars) only and we have noted that you did not authorize the release of your funds to anyone.
 
But, we are handicapped on the immediate release of your USD$8,000,000.00 Million US Dollars to you due to the contingencies of the legal documents presented by this impostor, which give her the legal right to claim your funds. For us (National Bank of Belgium) to effectively release your funds, you will need to help us serve you better by providing the below information(s):
 
1. Full Names:
2. Full residential address:
3. Your private phone and
4. Your direct contact address:
5. Your Marital Status:
6. Your Occupation:
7. Your Banking particulars such as Account Holder: Account Number: Bank Name: Bank Address: Routing Number: and Swift Code: where you intend your funds to be remitted.
 
Upon the receipt of the above information from you, the National Bank of Belgium will begin the process of releasing your USD$8million to you through bank transfer.
 
Important Notice:
 
Secondly, as directed by Mr. Christopher A. Wray of the FBI, you were advised to contact me for the immediate release of your funds, I have received your email and I want you to understand that your funds were recalled last week because you did not forward your claim as the right beneficiary, you have been misled all this while.
 
Note, for security reasons you have been assigned a code/password which is {Code: 310}. This code is the reference number for your transfer and it's been disclosed to you alone, jealously guard it and all your email responses should carry it as the subject phrase.
 
We are now aware that you did not authorize Mrs. Linda J. Box of NEW YORK who contacted us on your behalf to claim the US$8,000,000.00. This is now in the records of NBB.
 
Regarding the documents in question that Mrs. Linda J. Box presented, we are currently investigating the source. As not to influence our investigations, we at this moment plead with you to understand that we cannot send it to you till we determine the result of our investigation.
 
Concerning the release of your long overdue funds, you have to secure a court injunction from the Court of Cassation here to counter the lie placed on the funds so that we, the payee bank shall be given the authority to release the funds to you.
 
Mrs. Linda J. Box, in her desperate need to acquire your funds, obtained and placed a legal lien on the fund, thereby hindering us from remitting the fund to anyone except her. It is no fault of yours, but from your confirmation, we now know she is a dubious person who led us to believe you sent her.
 
However, the most urgent and important thing for you to do is to obtain the court injunction order, which shall counter the lien placed on your fund and restrain this dubious woman or any other person from having the legal right to claim/access your funds.
 
To secure the court injunction order,  you will be required to apply to the court of cassation here through the NBB accredited attorney who will do that on your behalf after we have received the re-confirmation of your information as requested above.
 
Thus, we again implore you to respond promptly so that the attorney can get the application filed on time and get a quick response letter with the requirements of the court of cassation for the release of the court injunction order to you. I will inform you of the next step once I receive your response.
 
Just to let you know, the FBI is monitoring the whole process to ensure we release your funds to you, so you have nothing to worry about. You can always reach me on my private phone number, Mobile: (+32 460 221207).
 
Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. 
 
Yours sincerely,

Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
Mobile Phone: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>
E-mail: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>
Governor, National Bank of Belgium (NBB).

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you in good health and spirits. First and foremost, allow me to extend my gratitude to you and your team at the National Bank of Belgium for your thorough diligence and the meticulous attention to the details surrounding my case. It is indeed heartening to see the rigorous measures being taken to ensure the security and rightful transfer of the funds in question.

In line with your latest communication and adhering to the guidelines you've outlined, please find below the requested information for the facilitation of my fund's transfer:

Understanding the complexity introduced by the actions of Mrs. Linda J. Box, I deeply appreciate the transparency of the NBB in handling this predicament. It reaffirms my faith in the integrity of your processes and the importance of following the rightful legal avenues to counter any illegitimate claims.

To this end, I am fully prepared to support the efforts needed to secure a court injunction from the Court of Cassation, as advised. Furthermore, I acknowledge the significance of the reference number (Code: 310) assigned to my case and understand the need to keep our communications secure. Rest assured, this code will be jealously guarded and used diligently in our future interactions.

Once again, I thank you, Mr. Wunsch, and the entire team at NBB for your unwavering support and guidance through this process. Your efforts to bring clarity and resolution to this situation are truly commendable. I look forward to your instructions regarding the engagement with the accredited attorney and any additional steps I should anticipate.

Best Regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu
